pullRequest.title: Fix deprecated `torch_dtype` argument in HuggingFace `from_pretrained` calls
pullRequest.body:
## Summary

- Replaces `torch_dtype=dtype` with `dtype=dtype` in all internal calls to HuggingFace's `from_pretrained()` methods in `transformer_lens/loading_from_pretrained.py`
- The `torch_dtype` parameter is deprecated in recent versions of the `transformers` library in favor of `dtype`
- Preserves the backwards-compatible acceptance of `torch_dtype` from users (the code at lines 2389-2391 that translates user-provided `torch_dtype` kwargs is unchanged)

Fixes #1093

## Details

8 call sites updated in `loading_from_pretrained.py`:
- `AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained` (4 calls: stanford-crfm checkpoint, EleutherAI/pythia checkpoint, general fallback, and default)
- `HubertModel.from_pretrained`
- `Wav2Vec2Model.from_pretrained`
- `BertForPreTraining.from_pretrained`
- `T5ForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained`
- `AutoModel.from_pretrained` (Gemma 3 multimodal)

The other files (`HookedTransformer.py`, `HookedEncoder.py`, `HookedEncoderDecoder.py`) were checked but only contain user-facing backwards-compatibility code that reads `torch_dtype` from user kwargs -- they do not pass it to HuggingFace's `from_pretrained`, so no changes were needed there.

## Test plan

- [ ] Verify models load correctly with the updated `dtype=` parameter
- [ ] Confirm no deprecation warnings from HuggingFace transformers library
